reason: Toy Story – 81-minute family-friendly animation about sentient toys on the move
Babe – 91-minute heartwarming tale of a pig finding its place on a farm
The Nightmare Before Christmas – 76-minute stop-motion musical blending Halloween and Christmas
Dumbo – 64-minute Disney classic of a flying elephant overcoming adversity
Reservoir Dogs – 99-minute gritty crime thriller from Quentin Tarantino
Ace Ventura: Pet Detective – 86-minute comedy starring Jim Carrey as an animal-loving sleuth
Clueless – 97-minute teen comedy set in a stylish Beverly Hills high school
Clerks – 89-minute indie comedy following a day in the life of two convenience store clerks
Swingers – 96-minute comedy about aspiring actors navigating dating in 90s Hollywood
Kids – 84-minute raw drama exploring youth culture in 90s New York
